_comment: PINNED bot-control-API v1 contract — the request/response shape the dashboard's DRY-RUN previews are built against, mirroring the console_data_contract.json pin pattern. The human spec is docs/specs/bot-control-api-v1.md. IMPORTANT: this service is permanently credential-free (owner decision Q-0004 is OPEN; doctrine places a wired control panel in a SEPARATE service) — this file defines shapes only; no endpoint URL, token, or credential of any kind exists anywhere in this service. The server side is superbot's control-api seam (disbot/control_api.py), which does not serve v1 yet; when it does, superbot should commit the canonical copy and this pin syncs from it exactly like the console contract. Every action the /admin dry-run UI can preview is validated against this pin by dashboard/control_plane.py and by tests.

submission.moderate.note: Defined in the contract for completeness; NOT previewable from this dashboard — gated on rework-plan Q5 (submissions Postgres + issue-mirror PAT).

out_of_scope_reason: No restart/uptime/live-status semantics exist in any committed feed today; introducing them is a superbot-side open question recorded in docs/specs/bot-control-api-v1.md.
